source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The pulley in figure has radius \(0.160\text{ m}\) and moment of inertia \(0.380\text{ kg}\cdot\text{m}^2\). The rope does not slip on the pulley rim. calculate the speed of the \(4.00\text{ kg}\) block just before it strikes the floor.
